data.title: 国际服例行维护 #94 维护延长
data.summary: [9/23 Scheduled Maintenance Notice] Sensei, there is a scheduled maintenance on 9/23 (Tue). 🗓️Mainte
data.body:
[9/23 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, there is a scheduled maintenance on 9/23 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 9/23 (Tue) 2:00 – 7:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3140482

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.
![G1MkjnoboAAdP3i.jfif](https://kivo.wiki/files/15949/zxQ2ynGKbdhg4z1lDKPyu5uLGKIphUz6.jpg)

[Extended Maintenance Notice]

9/23(Tue) Maintenance has been extended, Sensei.
Maintenance is now due to end at 10:00 AM (UTC).

Additional notices will be provided if there are further delays.
We apologize for the inconvenience.

![20251006_195930.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/16130/ZyPXXnwlc8XtvnnQbcwMnFUYcrC6s7dq.jpg)
